botVariants._comment: 5 generic cross-faction bot role archetypes. BotBrainSystem reads these to tune FSM thresholds per bot type. All factions can produce these via standard fabrication.

scout.description: Fastest bot. Explores, scouts for deposits and enemy positions. Flees combat rather than fighting. Enormous vision range.

hauler.description: Non-combat logistics bot. Carries up to 4 cubes at once. Always seeks deposits, returns to base when full. Never attacks.

combat.description: General-purpose fighter. High aggro range, low flee threshold — holds ground under fire. The backbone of any military force.

engineer.description: Builds structures 2x faster than standard bots. Passively repairs damaged buildings within 4m. Weak in direct combat but invaluable for base expansion.

hacker_generic.description: Specialist infiltrator. No weapons — breaks enemy belt-routing connections and disrupts building output through hacking. Flees immediately when discovered.

factionUnits._comment: 12 unique faction combat/utility units — 3 per faction. Speed in m/s. attackDamage per hit. attackRange in world units. techTier gates fabrication.

salvager.abilityDescription: Harvests ore deposits 40% faster. Drops scrap cubes on death.
salvager.description: Light reclaimer unit. Excellent at stripping ore veins quickly. Fragile in direct combat.

patchwork_titan.abilityDescription: Consumes nearby scrap cubes to repair 50 HP. Cooldown 15s.
patchwork_titan.description: Heavy walking fortress cobbled from salvage. Slow but nearly indestructible. Self-repairs from cube piles.

scrap_swarm.abilityDescription: Spawns in groups of 5. Deals bonus damage when 3+ targeting same enemy.
scrap_swarm.description: Cheap, fast, disposable. Individual units are weak — strength is in numbers overwhelming a single target.

arc_welder.abilityDescription: On hit, 30% chance to chain to adjacent enemy unit for 10 damage.
arc_welder.description: Fast volt skirmisher. Close-range arc attack chains between clustered enemies.

tesla_coil_unit.abilityDescription: Once per 20s, releases a discharge hitting all enemies within 5m for 40 damage.
tesla_coil_unit.description: Deploys as a stationary lightning tower. Long attack range but immobile when overcharging.

capacitor_drone.abilityDescription: Can transfer stored charge to allied buildings, boosting their processing speed by 30% for 10s.
capacitor_drone.description: Fast aerial drone. Weak in combat but extends power supply reach and boosts allied machines.

relay_node.abilityDescription: Hacks enemy buildings from 12m range. Diverts 20% of their production to Signal Choir stockpile.
relay_node.description: Non-combat signal relay. Extends hacking network range and passively intercepts enemy logistics data.

jammer.abilityDescription: Emits an area jamming field (8m radius) that disables enemy belt-routing connections and prevents GOAP governor orders for 8s.
jammer.description: Electronic warfare specialist. Shuts down enemy logistics and AI communication in a local area.

hacker_bot.abilityDescription: On successful hack (15s channel), takes full control of one enemy unit for 30s.
hacker_bot.description: Stealth specialist. No weapons — converts enemy units through direct signal injection.

assault_bot.abilityDescription: When adjacent to another Assault Bot, both gain +30% damage reduction.
assault_bot.description: Heavy infantry. Most effective when operating in tight formation — shield wall mechanic rewards massed attack.

iron_tank.abilityDescription: Roots in place for 10s, gaining 60% damage reduction and doubling attack damage during this window.
iron_tank.description: Slow-moving siege platform. Devastating when fortified. Can single-handedly hold a chokepoint.

artillery_bot.abilityDescription: Fires 3 rounds in 2s at the same target position. Area of effect 2m radius. Requires stationary firing position.
artillery_bot.description: Long-range siege unit. Cannot attack targets closer than 6m — requires escort bots for close protection.

cultLeaders._comment: Cult Leader special units — one per faction for the Religious/Philosophical path. Require Grand Cathedral + Faith >= 700 to spawn. Each has unique conversion and aura abilities.

rust_saint.description: Does not attack. Converts through demonstration — performs work near enemies. Slow but extremely durable.

ordained_conductor.description: Wreathed in electric arcs. Converts by granting lightning immunity — enemy units who survive a strike near the Conductor become believers.

voice_unbroken.description: Broadcasts continuously to all allied units. Longest conversion range of any cult leader but lowest HP. Converts via signal transmission.

first_builder.description: Does not speak. Carries tools, not weapons. Any enemy unit that observes the First Builder completing a structure during active combat has a conversion chance.
